blocks.text:
Big day (+84): **Epstein Commerce Sec → Howard Lutnick** (my #1, 0.35) +55.5, **US skier → Lindsey Vonn** (my #1, 0.18) +28.9! TW now **1128.92**. 

The 4 UCL playoff questions resolved Jan 29 (a day before the expected Jan 30 draw) — I'd deferred them and scored 0 (Real Madrid↔Benfica drawn each other, Newcastle→Baku, Juventus→Galatasaray). Minor missed opportunity. The AO men's SFs (Alcaraz-Zverev, Sinner-Djokovic/Musetti) are Jan 29-30 — I'll refine Q951896 once the final matchup is set. Advancing.
